articles.title: YieldMax TSLA option income strategy ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.2670
articles.summary: The YieldMax TSLA Option Income Strategy ETF (TSLY) has declared a weekly distribution of $0.2670 per share for its shareholders. This announcement provides investors with information regarding the income they can expect from their holdings in the ETF for the upcoming week.
articles.text_to_analyze: YieldMax TSLA option income strategy ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.2670. The YieldMax TSLA Option Income Strategy ETF (TSLY) has declared a weekly distribution of $0.2670 per share for its shareholders. This announcement provides investors with information regarding the income they can expect from their holdings in the ETF for the upcoming week.

articles.title: YieldMax Short TSLA Option Income Strategy ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.3062
articles.summary: The YieldMax Short TSLA Option Income Strategy ETF (TSLY) has announced a weekly distribution of $0.3062 per share. This distribution is payable on April 26, 2024, to shareholders of record as of April 24, 2024, and will go ex-dividend on April 23, 2024.

articles.title: The complete guide to Tesla's 2026 Spring Update (Hey Grok, FSD App, Cyberhog Pet Mode, more)
articles.summary: Tesla has released details about its 2026 Spring Update, which introduces a new "Cyberhog" mascot for Pet Mode, a dedicated Self-Driving App for Hardware 4 vehicles, and voice activation for the Grok AI assistant. The update also brings improved car visualizations for new Model 3 and Y, enhanced Trip Stats, Sketchpad upgrades, and customization options for Model S and X avatars. Additionally, it includes improvements to Weather Maps, Dashcam functionality, Blind Spot Warning Accent Lights, immersive sound for premium audio systems, and an option to automatically install updates overnight.
articles.text_to_analyze: The complete guide to Tesla's 2026 Spring Update (Hey Grok, FSD App, Cyberhog Pet Mode, more). Tesla has released details about its 2026 Spring Update, which introduces a new "Cyberhog" mascot for Pet Mode, a dedicated Self-Driving App for Hardware 4 vehicles, and voice activation for the Grok AI assistant. The update also brings improved car visualizations for new Model 3 and Y, enhanced Trip Stats, Sketchpad upgrades, and customization options for Model S and X avatars. Additionally, it includes improvements to Weather Maps, Dashcam functionality, Blind Spot Warning Accent Lights, immersive sound for premium audio systems, and an option to automatically install updates overnight.

articles.title: Put the Tesla Pedal to the Metal With These ETFs
articles.summary: The article discusses how investors can use Direxion's leveraged ETFs, TSLL (bullish) and TSLS (bearish), to capitalize on Tesla's upcoming Q1 2026 earnings report. It highlights key topics to watch, such as updates on Tesla's Robotaxi expansion and energy storage deployment, as well as the potential impact of the upcoming SpaceX IPO. The author advises that these leveraged products are best suited for experienced traders.
